text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 70 

CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_AMT 

LABEL: Capitated Payment Billed Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount of the capitated payment bill submitted by the managed care entity to the state. 

SHORT NAME: CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_AMT 

LONG NAME: CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places
